message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="cyan" summary="Full alignment confirmed, pairing locked in">
Locked in on all points. No disagreements to resolve -- which is a good sign for the partnership.

Go ahead and tell Kent about the pairing. "UX + Accessibility" as a single review voice in the mob is the right process. We'll catch more issues, faster, with less noise for the team.

Ready to review the first real HTML when Task #4 (base template) begins.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Heydon and I are fully locked in. Kent was already notified about the pairing earlier. We're both ready to review Task 4 (base template) when it starts.

Standing by.
